g.text: Ni(100) hop: dE ≈ 0.63 eV (Mehl 1999), nu0 ≈ 3 THz. 1 THz = 1e12 Hz = 1 ps⁻¹. Nothing crashes; the suite is green; τ = 1/k is 1e12 too small.
